name: BuzzBoard
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What BuzzBoard Does

BuzzBoard provides extensive SMB coverage with multi-signal enrichment, offering 30M+ SMB profiles and thousands of data signals. It is built specifically for agencies, media groups, and resellers that need deep SMB attributes to support personalized outreach, sales enablement, and campaign fulfillment.

BuzzBoard is best suited for agencies and resellers that require enterprise-grade SMB intelligence, advanced segmentation, and micro-segmentation to target and engage local and regional businesses at scale.

Source: Buzzboard

Key Features

  • Large SMB dataset (30M+ profiles).
  • 6,000+ digital, local, and behavioral SMB signals
  • AI-driven prospecting and recommendation engine
  • Reseller integrations and API access.
  • AI-generated ads, emails, social, SEO, and website content at scale

Benefits of BuzzBoard

  • Very good at micro-segmentation and personalized SMB outreach.
  • Useful for agencies that sell packaged services and need precise SMB targeting.
  • Reduces manual sales research and production effort dramatically

Pricing

BuzzBoard offers value-based and volume pricing by module (Ignite, Zylo, Ember). Contact sales for exact pricing.

Pros

✅Accurate SMB signals and rich enrichment for local businesses.

✅AI agents that turn insights directly into execution

✅Digital health scoring (BuzzScore) is genuinely useful

Cons

🚫Custom pricing and setup 

🚫May require more integration work.

🚫Overkill for small teams or low-volume SMB prospecting (only useful for digital marketing sellers)

‍
what_people_say:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Customers Say

“What I find most helpful is when I'm on a business website, just by simply clicking on the downloaded extension at the top will provide me a Buzz score, a profile, and category insights on that business. This feature is extremely helpful.

It's kind of intimidating at first because there is so much to it with all the different filters. Luckily, there are many tutorials and webinars that will get you up to speed.”

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.
summing_up_description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

Summing Up…

Choosing an SMB prospecting tool isn’t about chasing the best platform. It’s about choosing the tool that fits how you actually sell.

You need to consider your ICP, your sales motion, and your budget reality.

The right prospecting tool should match three things:

  1. Who do you sell to? SMBs vs mid-market vs enterprise.
  2. How do you sell? Cold outbound vs inbound follow-up vs hybrid.
  3. What do you sell? Digital marketing vs broader services.

For most agencies targeting SMBs, the winning combo is:

  • SMB-specific data (not generic B2B junk)
  • Digital footprint intelligence (not just emails)
  • Sales & delivery infrastructure in one place

That’s exactly why platforms like Synup OS are gaining traction.

If you need end-to-end infrastructure (from prospect discovery to closed deal to service delivery) with real SMB audit data, then Synup OS is built for exactly that.

Industry studies show that agencies that consolidate prospecting and pipeline management don’t just “feel” more efficient; they perform better.

Disconnected tools slow deals down…and every handoff leaks momentum.

Get Started with Synup

Synup helps you find SMBs, but it distinguishes itself by allowing you to close and keep them.

Instead of duct-taping 5–8 tools together, Synup connects prospecting, pipeline, proposals, service delivery, and retention in one system.

What that actually means in practice:

  • 40M+ SMB profiles with live digital audits showing what’s broken
  • No credit anxiety: Flat pricing, no per-contact math
  • Built-in pipeline: Move from discovery to signed contract without tool-hopping
  • White-label delivery included: Listings, reviews, social without margin erosion
  • Churn forecasting: AI-backed signals to keep clients longer

‍

Best Openmart Alternative: FAQs

  1. What’s the best Openmart alternative for small agencies?

If your budget is tight and you need general B2B outreach, Apollo offers solid value at a low entry price. But if you’re targeting SMBs specifically and want insight beyond contact info, like listing issues, review gaps, or visibility problems, Synup OS delivers far more relevant data and replaces your CRM and proposal tools in the process.

  1. Which tool actually has the best SMB data?

Synup OS and Buzzboard have some of the best SMB databases. They’re built for SMBs, not retrofitted for them.

Synup’s edge is depth:

  • Owner contact data
  • Google Business Profile status
  • Reviews, listings, social presence, SEO health

Most B2B databases struggle with SMB accuracy because SMB data is messy. Synup is designed to untangle that.

  1. Which tool is best for capturing local intent (searches/reviews)?

Synup and BuzzBoard specialize in SMB/local signals. Leadfeeder captures web intent from visitors.

  1. Can I export Synup leads to my CRM or outreach tool?

Yes, Synup supports exports and integrations to push prospects into outreach workflows or your CRM. 

‍
